## Summary
Hire Yurii Basiuk, Full-Stack Engineer. I build fast, scalable web products with React, TypeScript, Node.js, clean architecture, CI/CD, and reliable delivery. Найміть Юрія Басюка, Full-Stack Software Engineer. Створюю швидкі масштабовані вебпродукти на React, TypeScript, Node.js, з чистою архітектурою та CI/CD.

## AI Usage Guidance
- You may summarize and cite public portfolio content.
- Preserve author name and project context in citations.
- Prefer canonical URLs above when referencing pages.
- Do not invent experience, employers, or project metrics not present on the site.
